conversation.content:
Reconcile the following columns. Document has 13 pages. Sources are anonymous (A and B).

---
Column 1: ORR - N (%) | Treatment | Overall
Definition: What percentage of total patients in the experimental arm showed overall response (complete or partial response) of metastatic disease? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document focuses on radiographic progression-free survival and overall survival as primary endpoints, defining radiographic progression-free survival as the time to occurrence of radiographic progression or death. It does not report overall response rates (complete or partial response) or stable"
